title: Is it worth it to track down a platinum collection
display_title: Is it worth it to track down a platinum collection
wikitext:
[]: Is it worth it to track down a platinum collection?             Quote Post by MKDestroyer » Wed Nov 05, 2014 8:07 pm I already have the original DVDs. I bought them about 3 months ago for $35. The quality was jittery when switching scenes but didn't bother me all that much. Stopped noticing it after like 2 episodes. Would you spend say, $60 plus if you already own the original DVDs? From what I know, the quality is better but is it worth that much money for something I already own?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Nov 05, 2014 9:04 pm Perfect DVDs versus Platinum DVDs? God yes. Platinum is way better than Perfect. It's like jumping from VHS to DVD, or DVD to Blu-ray almost. The elimination of frame jitter alone makes it worth it in my opinion. The Platinum DVDs have way better encoding, so there's less rainbowing, blocking, color bleed, etc. Sound is better too.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Wed Nov 05, 2014 9:35 pm I would say absolutely, for the reasons EM cited. Do it before they get more expensive!

[]:             Quote Post by svenge » Wed Nov 05, 2014 9:37 pm As an owner of both the original and Platinum releases, it's 100% worth it to go Platinum. Better audio, video, and no hard-subs like the original DVDs had.

[]:             Quote Post by MKDestroyer » Wed Nov 05, 2014 10:28 pm Man I really want to get this Platinum version but I can't believe I missed that one that only sold for $27 on Ebay. Now all I see is the bootleg versions -_- I used to own the Platinum collection back when it was released and being the idiot I was back then, I sold it. To this day, I can't remember why I sold it. I must have needed the money for a game. Sometimes, I slap myself, lol. Btw I also have the directors' cut resurrection DVD with episodes 21-23. And I have watched them too. The only episode I haven't seen is the directors' cut episode 24. Don't know if it's worth to buy just for 1 episode. But if I did buy the Platinum collection, I don't think I want to part with the original set. They look really nice. Is that weird that I don't want to sell them and that I would just keep both?

[]:             Quote Post by svenge » Thu Nov 06, 2014 12:57 am MKDestroyer wrote: Btw I also have the directors' cut resurrection DVD with episodes 21-23. And I have watched them too. The only episode I haven't seen is the directors' cut episode 24. Don't know if it's worth to buy just for 1 episode.

[]:             Quote Post by Jäeger » Thu Nov 06, 2014 4:37 am Purchase it as soon as you can, the difference it's a the biggest quality leap I've ever witnessed. The only thing that I miss to be a perfect collection it's the TRUE OA of ep 21 to 24. The ones in this collection are just the redrawn DC eps without the extra footage.

[]:             Quote Post by MKDestroyer » Thu Nov 06, 2014 8:36 pm Just in case I will say SPOILERS* but I'm sure most here have seen the whole show. So the platinum collection doesn't have the DC footage? For example, Asuka Kaji scene beginning of episode 22? Someone told me it was there. Also the platinum doesn't have the original episodes of 21-24? I actually like both the original episode 23 and DC episode 23. I actually prefer to watch the original first. Like if I were to get my friend into this I would totally show them the original first. I though Rei's death was really emotional in the original with how sudden it was. You see her thinking about Gendo and you see tears in her eyes and then immediately after she blows up =( The DC episode, someone new to the series would be like WTF just happened? Instead of really focusing on how sudden Rei's death is. THEN I would have them watch End of Evangelion. Then back to watch the DC version of episode 23 so it makes more sense. Anyone else feel this way?[/spoiler]

[]:             Quote Post by cyharding » Fri Nov 07, 2014 12:59 am MKDestroyer wrote: So the platinum collection doesn't have the DC footage?...Also the platinum doesn't have the original episodes of 21-24?

[]:             Quote Post by svenge » Fri Nov 07, 2014 1:43 am MKDestroyer wrote: Just in case I will say SPOILERS* but I'm sure most here have seen the whole show. So the platinum collection doesn't have the DC footage? For example, Asuka Kaji scene beginning of episode 22? Someone told me it was there. Also the platinum doesn't have the original episodes of 21-24? [/spoiler]

[]:             Quote Post by MKDestroyer » Fri Nov 07, 2014 4:54 pm So is that why the episodes I've looked up online have the newly redrawn parts plus original dubbed voices but are missing the directors' cut footage? If that's the case then that question has been bugging me for months now. I was wondering why my resurrection DVD had different dubbed voices but when I looked up the episodes online they had their original voices with the newly redrawn faces but couldn't find any episodes with the DC footage. But then, why would these people upload the original episodes from the platinum collection and not the DC episodes?

[]:             Quote Post by svenge » Sun Nov 09, 2014 7:04 am MKDestroyer wrote: So is that why the episodes I've looked up online have the newly redrawn parts plus original dubbed voices but are missing the directors' cut footage? If that's the case then that question has been bugging me for months now. I was wondering why my resurrection DVD had different dubbed voices but when I looked up the episodes online they had their original voices with the newly redrawn faces but couldn't find any episodes with the DC footage. But then, why would these people upload the original episodes from the platinum collection and not the DC episodes?

[]:             Quote Post by MKDestroyer » Sun Nov 09, 2014 2:53 pm Just bought it! Thanks. You know I kept searching for that one but kept typing in Evangelion Genesis Reborn and that one never showed up. Guess I should have just typed in Evangelion directors' cut. Even if the original DVDs quality sucks, atleast I have the complete tv series now when that one comes in. Still gotta track down a platinum collection for cheap. Bunch of bootlegs still floating around though.
